location: Inside a chest in Sage's Cave, behind an illusory wall, in a room reached after a skeleton-guarded chamber and a waterfall descent.
region: Altus Plateau (Sage's Cave, west of Wyndham Ruins)
tactics: From Abandoned Coffin grace, head northeast past a cluster of Giant Poison Flowers to reach the cave entrance
The dungeon has several illusory walls — expect to roll/attack suspicious dead-ends throughout, not just once
Push past a skeleton-guarded room and a waterfall drop-down; the talons sit in a chest in the chamber beyond, alongside Golden Greatarrows and Dragonwound Grease
No boss gates the loot — pure navigation, plus a couple of skeleton ambushes; the cave also holds Necromancer Garris and a Black Knife Assassin as optional side fights
lore: Claws issued to the assassins of Ravenmount, who trained by studying the diving strike patterns of Deathbirds — wielders emulate that swooping attack style directly, the weapon's jump and charged aerial attacks modeled on a bird of prey stooping on prey from above.

builds.name: Pure Dex jump-attack
builds.why: The most extreme Dex-scaling of the four claws plus a roughly 10% jump-attack damage bonus — pairs naturally with the Raptor's Black Feathers armor found in the same dungeon
